ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the chemical */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the chemical */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the chemical */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the chemical */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the chemical in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing parameter row */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical used */,
  "de_sizing" INTEGER /* Amount of chemical used in de-sizing */,
  "scouring" INTEGER /* Amount of chemical used in scouring */,
  "bleaching" INTEGER /* Amount of chemical used in bleaching */,
  "fabric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric type for which the parameters are specific */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at which the chemical is applied */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the chemical application in minutes */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the chemical in the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_parameters_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the log entry */,
  "amount_used" REAL /* Amount of chemical used */,
  "processing_stage" TEXT /* Stage of processing (e.g., de-sizing, scouring, bleaching) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch */,
  "fabric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric type */,
  "operator_notes" TEXT /* Notes added by the operator during the usage log entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the usage log (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES production_batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_logs_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_data_sheets" (
  "sds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety data sheet */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical the SDS belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the SDS document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the SDS was uploaded */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the SDS */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the SDS */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the SDS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_data_sheets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_data_sheets_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Identification number for the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of the production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "fabric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric type */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the fabric in the batch */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Quality status of the batch (e.g., good, needs review, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_chemical_usage" (
  "batch_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch usage entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used */,
  "amount_used" REAL /* Amount of chemical used in the batch */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who recorded the usage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the chemical usage in the batch */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the chemical application */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the chemical application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_chemical_usage_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_chemical_usage_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_chemical_usage_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES production_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_management" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical associated with the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., SDS, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_management_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_management_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
